# TradeBot - IC Markets Demo

## Install
```bash
pip install ctrader-open-api twisted protobuf
```

## Run
```bash
python3 tradebot_openapi.py
```

## Files
- `config.json` - API credentials
- `tradebot_openapi.py` - Uses official cTrader Open API (TCP/Protobuf)
- `tradebot.py` - Simple version (Yahoo Finance prices)

## Demo Account
- Account: 9877716
